Current R/R ratio of 1.14x falls below the hard constraint of 1.5x minimum. # BBCA Debate Summary

**Bull vs. Bear:** Bulls argue BBCA's sharp decline represents a generational buying opportunity, citing strong fundamentals (22.97% ROE, 12.53x P/E) and technical oversold conditions, while bears contend the 39.7% decline reflects genuine price discovery driven by margin comp
